name: finance-copilot-agent
description: Personal Finance Management with AI Copilot Agent

scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules shared/node_modules backend/dist frontend/dist
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
